---
title: "BlogDemo"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

setwd("C:/Users/Spot/Documents/GitHub/s-vargas.github.io")

install.packages('blogdown')


library(blogdown)


new_site(theme = "hugo")

build_site()

#Then drag and drop in your github

blogdown::hugo_build()
